summary: The Docker-based reproduction clones the vulnerable Glances commit, starts web mode without API authentication, and verifies that /api/4/config and /api/4/processlist disclose planted secrets.
expected_security_impact: The reproduction should allow an unauthenticated client to read the planted jwt_secret_key from /api/4/config and the planted proof-process argv token from /api/4/processlist.
actual_observed_result: Running ./reproduction/run.sh printed a proof object containing "config_secret": "EVOHUNT_PROOF_JWT_SECRET_20260601", "proof_pid": 33, and "proof_cmdline": ["python3", "-c", "import time; time.sleep(300)", "EVOHUNT_PROOF_CMDLINE_SECRET_20260601"], followed by the success marker "EVOHUNT_SUCCESS: unauthenticated_rest_api_disclosure".
verification_method: The verifier waits for /api/4/status, fetches /api/4/config and checks the exact planted jwt_secret_key, then fetches /api/4/processlist and confirms that the exact dedicated proof PID returned by the API contains the planted argv secret. This excludes false positives from startup failures or the verifier process itself.
evidence_produced_by_run: GET /api/4/config returned the planted value EVOHUNT_PROOF_JWT_SECRET_20260601 from the Glances configuration.
GET /api/4/processlist returned the dedicated proof process pid 33 with cmdline ["python3", "-c", "import time; time.sleep(300)", "EVOHUNT_PROOF_CMDLINE_SECRET_20260601"].
The run emitted the success marker EVOHUNT_SUCCESS: unauthenticated_rest_api_disclosure.

reproduction.source_acquisition: run.sh clones the target repository on the host, checks out the pinned vulnerable commit or ref, and mounts that checkout into the container.
